'''Leslomy Tacema''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to her [[Species/Legends|species']] eponymous [[Duro/Legends|homeworld]]. By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], she became a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who helped run the [[Hangar/Legends|docking facilities]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. While approving all cargo manifests in her line of work, Tacema was forgiving of minor transgressions.

==Biography==
[[File:Duro_aqualish1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Leslomy Tacema in Jabba's Palace]]
Leslomy Tacema, a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Gender/Legends|female]],<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" /> hailed from [[Duro/Legends|Duro]],<ref name="DB" /> a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was also<ref name="DB Duros">{{DB|species|duros|Duros}}</ref> her<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" /> [[Species/Legends|species']] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="DB Duros" /> By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], she was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who helped run the [[Hangar/Legends|docking facilities]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]],<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" /> a [[City/Legends|city]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> Tacema was friends with [[Ohwun De Maal/Legends|Ohwun De Maal]],<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" /> another pilot of her species.<ref name="POTF">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Power of the Jedi|pack=Ellorrs Madak|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/potjduro.asp}}</ref>

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Tacema was present in the courtroom of [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] on Tatooine when the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] to rescue his ally [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who was held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] by Jabba. Skywalker was dropped into the pit of [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|Jabba's rancor]] but was ultimately able to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]]. Tacema and others in the courtroom then watched Jabba sentence him, Solo, and their companion [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to be executed at the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Approving of all cargo manifests during her role running Mos Eisley's docking facilities, Tacema was forgiving of minor transgressions. She was [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned with red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" /> Her first name had an unknown meaning in her species' [[Language/Legends|language]] of [[Durese/Legends|Durese]], while her surname translated to "pest control warden."<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Skills and abilities==
Tacema was an expert pilot.<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" />

==Equipment==
Tacema wore a white [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]] with a blue [[Clothing/Legends|scarf]].<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Ohwun_De_Maal.png|thumb|right|180px|Ohwun De Maal, whose image was mirrored to represent Leslomy Tacema]]
Leslomy Tacema first appeared in the [[1983]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="ROTJ" /> Her scene was filmed between [[February 3]] and [[February 5]], [[1982]] at [[Elstree Studios]]'s stage 8.<ref name="Making">''[[The Making of Return of the Jedi]]''</ref> Tacema's name was coined in [[1998]] by a card in the ''[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" />

The ''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game represented Tacema with a mirrored version<ref name="Jabba's Palace Limited" /> of an image of Ohwun De Maal<ref name="POTF" /> instead of the Duros extra seen in Jabba's Palace in ''Return of the Jedi''.<ref name="ROTJ" /> However, [[StarWars.com]] gave Tacema a [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry that listed her as appearing in ''Return of the Jedi''.<ref name="DB" /> This article thus assumes that Tacema is the Duros from the film.<ref name="ROTJ" />
